name: Outreach
description: The leading sales engagement platform for enterprise sales teams. Outreach automates multi-channel sequences (email, phone, LinkedIn, SMS), provides AI-driven insights, and helps reps execute consistent outbound at scale.
whyUseIt: Outreach is the tool that turns your outbound strategy into an executable machine. Instead of manually sending emails and tracking follow-ups in spreadsheets, Outreach automates the cadence, tracks engagement (opens, clicks, replies), and surfaces the hottest prospects. For teams doing serious outbound, it's the standard.
aiCapabilities: Outreach AI scores sequences by effectiveness, suggests optimal send times, recommends next actions, generates email copy, and provides sentiment analysis on buyer responses.
funnelPosition: Top of funnel — prospecting and outbound engagement
sellerWorkflow: SDRs load prospects into sequences, Outreach sends emails on schedule, logs calls and tasks, and tracks engagement. AEs use sequences for nurturing and re-engagement. Managers view team activity and sequence performance dashboards.
managerExpects: Consistent sequence execution — prospects enrolled on time, personalisation completed, call tasks executed daily, and engagement data feeding back into strategy.
demoDescription: Create a multi-step sequence with email, call, and LinkedIn steps. Enrol a prospect. View the engagement timeline showing opens, clicks, and replies. Analyse sequence performance across the team.

vocabulary.definition: A multi-step, multi-channel cadence that automatically executes outreach tasks on a defined schedule.
A single interaction step within a sequence: an email, a call, a LinkedIn action, or a manual task.

beginnerMistakes: Using templates without personalising the first line and trigger
Not pausing sequences when a prospect responds (avoiding awkward automated follow-ups)
Ignoring engagement data — if open rates are below 30%, your subject lines need work
